title: Fix locking interaction in batched Exec() on container
body: Small fix I noticed looking at other thing - prevent Exec() from unlocking a container during a batched operation.

comments.body: @rhatdan @baude @TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL - would like to get this in before release today
